name: Lattice Labs
description: Pre-product seed company building deterministic build caches for monorepos. Founders out of stealth, hiring founding engineers.

name: Hyperloop Compute
description: GPU orchestration platform for inference workloads. Series A from tier-1 lead, scaling SRE and inference-runtime teams.

name: Cobalt Health
description: Clinical workflow automation for ambulatory specialty practices. Hiring backend and ML applied scientists post Series A.

name: Nimbus Ledger
description: B2B payments + ledgering API serving mid-market SaaS. Building out platform engineering and a founding sales-engineering function.

name: Quanta Robotics
description: Warehouse automation hardware + perception stack. Series B-funded, hiring senior perception, controls, and field-deployment engineers.

name: Verdant Forge
description: Industrial decarbonization platform — emissions accounting and procurement workflows for Fortune 500 supply chains.

name: Helio Markets
description: Late-stage trading-infrastructure platform for prop firms. Replacing core matching engine; hiring staff-level systems engineers and security leads.

name: Brightline Logistics
description: Multimodal freight orchestration for enterprise shippers. Growth-stage, building out data-platform and applied-ML organizations.
